ottoextra_translateutils.module.desc: Automatically translates RP chat messages into a target language. Emotes between *...* and protected text parts stay untouched; the original can be appended in parentheses.
ottoextra_translateutils.card.main.desc: Language pair and chat display. Assign the quick-toggle hotkey in Options → Controls → Key Binds.
ottoextra_translateutils.opt.showOrigina: Appends the original in parentheses as long as the 256-character chat limit allows it.
ottoextra_translateutils.card.protect.de: These text parts are masked before translation and restored unchanged afterwards.
ottoextra_translateutils.opt.protectEmot: Text between asterisks stays in the original language.
ottoextra_translateutils.opt.protectTags: Short tags like [OOC] or [RP] are not translated.
ottoextra_translateutils.card.api.desc: LibreTranslate-compatible endpoint. On errors or timeout the original message is always sent.
ottoextra_translateutils.opt.apiKey.tip: Optional — only for protected translation servers.
